---
name: Bug report
about: Report incorrect or unexpected Plimsoll behavior
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the problem.

## Plimsoll version

Output of:

```bash
plimsoll --version
```

## Command run

The exact command you ran.

```bash

```

## Trace and policy

The relevant trace and policy, sanitized of any real or sensitive data. Trim to
the smallest input that reproduces the issue.

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen (for example, which findings or exit code).

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include the report output or error message if relevant.

## Environment

- OS:
- Python version (`python --version`):
